metadata.description: Claude Code skills for RxAppKit — RxSwift bindings for AppKit.

plugins.name: rxappkit-bindings
plugins.description: Teaches Claude the canonical RxAppKit binding patterns: prefer rx.click / rx.<property> / rx.nodes / rx.items over PublishRelay+@objc plumbing and hand-rolled NSTableViewDataSource / NSOutlineViewDataSource / NSCollectionViewDataSource / NSBrowserDelegate. Surfaces the @dynamicMemberLookup mechanism on HasTargeAction conformers.
